content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Ranger
description: Legendary Anshin class mod for Axton the Commando, part of the Digistruct Peak content. Built around Ranger, Quick Charge, Onslaught, Impact, Metal Storm. Provides strong team shield bonuses.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC. The Onslaught bonus is bugged: it only applies if you equip the mod while the kill skill is already active, and you must repeat this each time it ends. The displayed team recharge delay value may also be incorrect. The red text nods to the Joker's line from Batman.

special.description: At max level: +60.5% team Shield Recharge Rate, -57.5% Shield Recharge Delay.
special.title: Wanna know why I got these scars?
